weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 20 total findings, with 14 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-7687, CVE-2026-7689, and CVE-2026-7691, among others. The most active day was May 4, 2026, with multiple security domains impacted, including Cloud and IAM, Containers and K8s, and OS and Kernel, highlighting the diverse nature of the threats. Notably, each of the tracked CVEs appeared only once, indicating a broad range of vulnerabilities being exploited, and emphasizing the need for continued vigilance across all active security domains, which also encompass Crypto Libraries, Maven and Java, npm and Node, PyPI and Python, and Supply Chain.
